milestoneTitle: Phase M9.16e — Vignette gradient more concentrated toward the edges. Peak alphas at 0% and 100% unchanged (0.24); the fade to transparent now finishes at 16% / 84% (was 25% / 75%), so the dark band lives in a tighter ~16% strip at each edge and the clear middle widens from 50% to 68% of viewport height.
